hooks.note: PW-GF-09(R) annotates a 'T8 Hook @100 mm' group and a 'T8 UBAR @150 mm' group — hooks and U-shapes exist among the T8 groups, but which ends/angles cannot be read from annotations alone (needs section-geometry reading).

note: PROVENANCE: S-RBAR geometry adjacent to the N6/N7 labels was rendered and visually verified during Phase 12 research as a small U-shaped upstand bar cluster (vertical projecting legs on a base).
